matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $tcp = @(); $available = [bool](Get-Command Get-NetTCPSetting -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); if ($available) { $tcp = @(Get-NetTCPSetting | Select-Object SettingName, AutoTuningLevelLocal, CongestionProvider, EcnCapability) }; [pscustomobject]@{ get_net_tcp_setting_available = $available; tcp_settings = $tcp } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
